faqs.question: What is the return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 15-day return policy for unused items in their original packaging. Custom-made shoes cannot be returned.

faqs.question: How long will it take for my order to arrive?
faqs.answer: Our handcrafted process takes time. Standard orders are shipped within 7-10 business days.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship globally! International shipping rates are calculated at checkout.

faqs.question: Are these shoes made from genuine leather?
faqs.answer: Yes, we source the finest quality sustainable leather and artisan materials for all our footwear.

reviews.author: Arjun S.
reviews.content: These are absolutely stunning! The craftsmanship is top-notch and they are surprisingly comfortable right out of the box.

reviews.author: Karan M.
reviews.content: Very unique design, I get compliments every time I wear them. Fits slightly wide but generally true to size.

reviews.author: Ravi K.
reviews.content: Incredible shoes. Rangeela always delivers on quality and style.
